mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth above 130k signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 70%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 130k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in residential construction (HOUST) and real sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer demand, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d SPX returns are negative in 60%+ of periods when both HOUST and RSAFS show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) below 98.5 signals manufacturing weakness that reduces corporate profits and drives S&P 500 declines over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d SPX returns are positive in 70%+ of instances when INDPRO declines below 98.5.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 216 (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank tightening expectations, creating headwinds for equity valuations and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 216.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of high unemployment (UNRATE > 10%) and low wage growth (PAYEMS < 130k) indicates slack in the labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d SPX returns are positive in 50%+ of instances when both UNRATE > 10% and PAYEMS < 130k.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in real sales (RSAFS) above 344.7 billion combined with rising housing starts (HOUST > 590k) indicates strong consumer and business demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d SPX returns are negative in 60%+ of instances when both RSAFS and HOUST exceed thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO < 98.5) during a monetary tightening cycle (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) signals stagflation risks, creating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d SPX returns are positive in 50%+ of instances when INDPRO declines and FEDFUNDS rises above 4.5%.
